claims: The skill description includes allowed tools of "Read, Write, Edit, Bash(cmd:*), Grep" with no restrictions on scope, granting broad filesystem access and arbitrary command execution. For a skill focused on providing guidance and generating configurations for data partitioner tasks, unrestricted access to read/write/edit any file and execute any bash command is excessive and unrelated to its stated purpose of generating "step-by-step guidance" and "production-ready code and configurations." This poses significant security risks, as it could be used to access sensitive system files or perform unauthorized actions beyond data partitioning workflows.
